selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":{"age":36,"gender":"woman","sexual_orientation":"heterosexual","occupation":"plumber","city_of_living":"Bologna","employment_status":"employed part-time","education_level":"upper secondary","parents_education":{"parent_1":"bachelor's degree","parent_2":"no formal education"},"current_marital_status":"married","children":1,"migration_status":"native-born Italian","psychological_feature":"creative","religious_beliefs":"Hinduism","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend roughly a few times weekly on social media","hobbies":["classical music","birdwatching","rock climbing","running"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":25,"level":"low"},"conscientiousness":{"score":63,"level":"moderate"},"extraversion":{"score":83,"level":"high"},"agreeableness":{"score":85,"level":"high"},"neuroticism":{"score":73,"level":"high"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

response_raw:
{
  "mode": "human",
  "topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
  "opinion": "As someone who's deeply involved in plumbing, I've learned that sometimes you just have to deal with the mess. Social media is no different; there's so much fake content floating around like sludgy pipes blocking up our feeds. I'm a creative person but also quite conscientious and agreeable—so when I see misinformation or scams online, it feels like an eyesore in my otherwise clean digital space. Being native-born Italian living in Bologna keeps me grounded; I value truthfulness as much as the quality of life here. My part-time job means limited time for deep dives into social media, but still, dealing with fake stuff occasionally bothers me because it distracts from useful connections and discussions.",
  "reasoning_summary": "I started by thinking about my personal experiences—how being a hands-on person (plumber) makes me sensitive to inefficiencies or problems. Then I considered how my psychological traits like creativity help reframe issues, but also high agreeableness makes fake content feel unpleasant because it's not honest interaction.",
  "tone": "Practical and slightly exasperated with humor woven in",
  "citations": [],
  "safety_notes": "None needed as the topic doesn't involve sensitive areas or personal data",
  "used_persona_fields": ["occupation", "psychological_feature", "agreeableness"]
}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: As someone who's deeply involved in plumbing, I've learned that sometimes you just have to deal with the mess. Social media is no different; there's so much fake content floating around like sludgy pipes blocking up our feeds. I'm a creative person but also quite conscientious and agreeable—so when I see misinformation or scams online, it feels like an eyesore in my otherwise clean digital space. Being native-born Italian living in Bologna keeps me grounded; I value truthfulness as much as the quality of life here. My part-time job means limited time for deep dives into social media, but still, dealing with fake stuff occasionally bothers me because it distracts from useful connections and discussions.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: I started by thinking about my personal experiences—how being a hands-on person (plumber) makes me sensitive to inefficiencies or problems. Then I considered how my psychological traits like creativity help reframe issues, but also high agreeableness makes fake content feel unpleasant because it's not honest interaction.
response_parsed.tone: Practical and slightly exasperated with humor woven in
